rule_metadata.author: Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io
rule_metadata.title: Local Firewall Rules Enumeration Via NetFirewallRule Cmdlet

rules.rule_text:
title: Local Firewall Rules Enumeration Via NetFirewallRule Cmdlet
id: ea207a23-b441-4a17-9f76-ad5be47d51d3
status: test
description: Detects execution of "Get-NetFirewallRule" or "Show-NetFirewallRule"
  to enumerate the local firewall rules on a host.
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/netsecurity/get-netfirewallrule?view=windowsserver2022-ps
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/netsecurity/show-netfirewallrule?view=windowsserver2022-ps
author: Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io
date: 2023-07-13
tags:
- detection.threat-hunting
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1518.001
- attack.t1016
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_module
  definition: 0ad03ef1-f21b-4a79-8ce8-e6900c54b65b
detection:
  selection_payload:
    Payload|contains:
    - Get-NetFirewallRule
    - Show-NetFirewallRule
  selection_contextinfo:
    ContextInfo|contains:
    - Get-NetFirewallRule
    - Show-NetFirewallRule
  condition: 1 of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Administration scripts
level: low
